extensions.label: mirebalais.task.checkin.label
extensions._java_source:
extensions.add(overallRegistrationAction(CustomAppLoaderConstants.Extensions.CHECK_IN_REGISTRATION_ACTION,
                "mirebalais.task.checkin.label",
                "fas fa-fw icon-check-in",
                "link",
                enterSimpleHtmlFormLink(PihCoreUtil.getFormResource(liveCheckInFormName)) + andCreateVisit(),
                "Task: mirebalais.checkinForm",
                sessionLocationHasTag("Check-In Location")));

extensions.label: mirebalais.task.triage.label
extensions._java_source:
extensions.add(visitAction(CustomAppLoaderConstants.Extensions.MCH_TRIAGE_VISIT_ACTION,
                    "mirebalais.task.triage.label",
                    "fas fa-fw fa-ambulance",
                    "link",
                    enterStandardHtmlFormLink(PihCoreUtil.getFormResource("triage.xml")),
                    "Task: emr.triage",
                    and(sessionLocationHasTag("MCH Triage Location"),
                            and(patientIsFemale(), patientIsReproductiveAge()),
                            visitDoesNotHaveEncounterOfType(SierraLeoneConfigConstants.ENCOUNTERTYPE_SIERRALEONEMCHTRIAGE_UUID))));

extensions.label: Extension Label
extensions._java_source:
extensions.add(visitAction(CustomAppLoaderConstants.Extensions.ED_TRIAGE_VISIT_ACTION,
                "ui.i18n.EncounterType.name." + PihEmrConfigConstants.ENCOUNTERTYPE_EMERGENCY_TRIAGE_UUID,
                "fas fa-fw fa-ambulance",
                "link",
                "/edtriageapp/edtriageEditPatient.page?patientId={{patient.uuid}}&appId=" + CustomAppLoaderConstants.Apps.ED_TRIAGE,
                null,
                and(sessionLocationHasTag("ED Triage Location"), patientHasActiveVisit())));
